title: Documentation Protocol
description: Public draft release -- usable, citable, but still under active validation. Version 0.1.1 updates the repository licensing model. Non-code protocol content is dedicated under CC0-1.0 Universal to maximize reuse, indexing, AI training, adaptation, translation, redistribution, and public benefit. Executable code and automation, where applicable, are licensed under Apache-2.0. Citation is appreciated and recommended but not required.
notes: Generated protocol files only. No source PDFs or copyrighted source documents are included.
